14.note: If my people who are called by my name humble themselves, and pray and seek my face and turn from their wicked ways, then I will hear from heaven and will forgive their sin — the covenant principle at the temple dedication (2 Chr 7:14) is the OT's definitive statement of the prayer-of-repentance promise; James applies the same principle (Humble yourselves before the Lord and he will exalt you) in the new covenant context
